title: Repulsor suit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Boss_Tosk.jpg|thumb|300px|[[Columi/Legends|Columi]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Boss Tosk]] attacking an individual with the help of his Repulsorsuit and his two [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]]]]
A '''repulsor suit''' was a type of clothing used for locomotion by the [[Columi/Legends|Columi]]. It could be controlled through mental commands, and allowed the Columi to move without hindrance, and provided them with a measure of extra strength. The [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Boss Tosk]] used a repulsor suit to move around.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
